Minimum-viable board.yaml.description: Smallest board.yaml that compiles cleanly via scripts/alp_project.py.

Carrier populated-override block.description: Override the carrier preset's populated defaults (per-chip true/false).

Inference backend block.description: Pick an inference backend explicitly (defaults to the SoM preset's preferred_backend).

IoT feature toggles.description: Enable Wi-Fi / MQTT / BLE / TLS feature paths.

Libraries enable list.description: Make a user-facing library available with the SDK's compile-time profile applied.
